{{Quote|A security officer has to be able to provide security. Even when commanding officers are killed or subverted. He has to be able to see where everyone is, know what everyone is thinking. Otherwise things aren't safe.|Siron Tawaler to [[Lumiya]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>}}
'''Siron Tawaler''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and [[Police officer/Legends|head]] of [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security]] for [[Toryaz Station]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], during the negotiations between [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] on the station, [[Lumiya]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to manipulate [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Tawaler into believing he was to be her [[telbun]] and convinced him to go after a so called "rogue Jedi" after her and aided her first into allowing [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s soldiers to board the station, and then into walking into space through an [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]]. While he was still alive, he was considered ''unmotivated'' and ''inadequate'' by his superior officers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
